tasks.label: Build and Run Active C++ File
args: $dir = Split-Path -Parent '${file}'; $name = [IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension('${file}'); $out = Join-Path $dir 'output'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $out | Out-Null; $exe = Join-Path $out ($name + '.exe'); g++ '${file}' -o $exe; if ($?) { & $exe; Remove-Item $exe -Force; Remove-Item $out -Force }
